fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Design a six-legged walking robot with sticky feet for climbing walls"
"Create a soft robotic gripper that can handle delicate strawberries"
"Build a drone-robot hybrid that can both fly and roll on the ground"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Simulate how the robot behaves on slippery ice versus rough carpet"
"Test the impact of different spring dampers on a jumping leg"
"Run a collision test with various objects to see how the robot avoids obstacles"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Experiment with different materials for the robot's foot pads to see which gives best traction"
"Try out a new control algorithm to make the robot balance on one leg"
"Modify the robot's center of mass and see how it affects stability"

Perfect! Your 4-wheeler robot is ready! 🚗

**What I created:**
- **Chassis**: A rectangular body with a main platform and top cabin
- **4 Wheels**: Front-left, front-right, rear-left, and rear-right wheels mounted on hinge joints
- **4 Motors**: Independent motor control for each wheel (supports differential drive for turning)
- **Sensors**: Position, velocity, and wheel speed sensors for monitoring

**Features:**
- Each wheel can be controlled independently via the control panel
- High friction wheels for good traction
- Realistic mass distribution
- Free to move and rotate on the ground plane

The robot is now available in your simulator dropdown menu as "four_wheeler.xml". You can control each wheel motor independently using the sliders that will appear in the control panel! 🎮
